specific_question: Has Elexion Automotive secured legal counsel specializing in state franchise laws as of 2025 to support the direct-to-customer model transition?
answer: Yes, as of February 2025, Elexion Automotive retained the law firm Jack Morrison & Rachael Pierce, which specializes in U.S. automotive franchise law.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
